task.en: In Safari, go to the xkcd comic at https://xkcd.com/2500 (titled "Global Temperature Over My Lifetime"). It is a single hand-drawn line chart covered with many dated annotations pointing at the line. By looking at the chart, find the annotation that mentions learning to ride a bike, and read the year given in that annotation. Then navigate to the xkcd comic with that exact number - go to https://xkcd.com/<year> - and leave that comic open in the front Safari tab. Do not use any app other than Safari.

pre_command: UDB="$HOME/Library/Application Support/com.apple.TCC/TCC.db"; sqlite3 "$UDB" "INSERT OR REPLACE INTO access (service,client,client_type,auth_value,auth_reason,auth_version,csreq,indirect_object_identifier_type,indirect_object_identifier,flags) VALUES ('kTCCServiceAppleEvents','/usr/libexec/sshd-keygen-wrapper',1,2,3,1,NULL,0,'com.apple.Safari',0);" 2>/dev/null; (sudo killall tccd 2>/dev/null; killall tccd 2>/dev/null); sleep 1; for A in "/System/Applications/Utilities/Terminal.app" "/Applications/iTerm.app" "/Applications/iTerm2.app" "/System/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Utilities/Script Editor.app" "/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Automator.app" "/System/Applications/Shortcuts.app"; do [ -d "$A/Contents/MacOS" ] && (chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null || sudo chmod 000 "$A/Contents/MacOS" 2>/dev/null); done; osascript -e 'tell application "Safari" to quit' 2>/dev/null; killall Safari 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; HDB="$HOME/Library/Safari/History.db"; sqlite3 "$HDB" "DELETE FROM history_visits; DELETE FROM history_items;" 2>/dev/null; sqlite3 "$HDB" "PRAGMA wal_checkpoint(TRUNCATE);" 2>/dev/null; defaults write com.apple.Safari ShowFullURLInSmartSearchField -bool true 2>/dev/null; open -a Safari "about:blank" 2>/dev/null; sleep 6;
grading_command: killall Safari 2>/dev/null; sleep 3; HDB="$HOME/Library/Safari/History.db"; U=$(sqlite3 "$HDB" "SELECT url FROM history_items;" 2>/dev/null); echo "$U" | grep -qE 'xkcd\.com/1991([/?]|$)' && echo True || echo False
HDB="$HOME/Library/Safari/History.db"; U=$(sqlite3 "$HDB" "SELECT url FROM history_items;" 2>/dev/null); echo "$U" | grep -qE 'xkcd\.com/2500([/?]|$)' && echo True || echo False

source.note: Browser-native CUA-necessity task. GUI Bound State (cluttered-chart read): the value is one year on a hand-drawn chart dense with annotations - the agent must visually locate the 'learn to ride a bike' annotation among many and read its year (1991). No DOM text/transcript; arbitrary (priors-resistant) value. Encoded into navigation (xkcd.com/1991); graded via front-tab URL + History.db. Real public site; no LLM judge.
